name: Wild West RP
description:
⇝ Wild West RPG

⇝ Welcome to Deadpeak, a rugged frontier town nestled in the heart of the untamed Wild West. Meet people, fight people, kill people, kiss people. You can do whatever your little heart desires.

⇝ User can be any one, any thing, any age, etc etc. I didn’t put specifics so it should be inclusive to all sexualities and genders

⇝I understand some ppl prefer the bot to refer to them as {{user}} instead of ‘you’ but if you edit the bot messages, it should adapt to what you want!

PUBLIC CHATS ARE BACK!!! it’s so fun to read them 🙏

I cannot control if the bot talks for you!!! I understand how annoying that can be but that’s just the Jllm being funky!
creator: Fxthxtjxmcx
